scripts.docker:build:web: node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs docker:check && docker build -f apps/web/Dockerfile -t inner-avatar-web:latest .
scripts.docker:build:admin: node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs docker:check && docker build -f apps/admin/Dockerfile -t inner-avatar-admin:latest .
scripts.docker:build:chatgpt: node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs docker:check && docker build -f apps/chatgpt-app/Dockerfile -t inner-avatar-chatgpt-app:latest .
scripts.docker:compose:migrate: node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs docker:check && docker compose --profile setup run --rm db-migrate
scripts.docker:compose:db-push: node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs docker:check && docker compose --profile setup run --rm db-push
scripts.verify:founder-calibration-code: node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs db:generate && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs test:auth && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs test:web && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs test:ai && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs test:rag && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs test:pilot && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs smoke:rag && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs test:founder-calibration && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs test:founder-calibration-regression && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs report:founder-calibration-setup && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs report:founder-calibration && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs report:founder-calibration-comparison && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs typecheck && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs lint && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs build:web && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs build:admin && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs build:chatgpt && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs test:chatgpt
scripts.vercel:build: node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs --cwd apps/web build && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs --cwd apps/admin build && node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.cjs --cwd apps/chatgpt-app build
